description: Low-conflict session macro family with repeated coherent start-update-finish modules and no explicit reusable macro structure in code.
natural_language_spec: Each session macro opens with START_i, performs UPDATE_i, and closes with FINISH_i. The same coherent block repeats across modules, but the implementation does not contain an explicit reusable session macro abstraction.

formal_spec.safety_property: Every module must follow the coherent START, UPDATE, FINISH pattern.

logs.message: FINISH observed before UPDATE completed in one module
